ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Size of each batch used in the experiment */,
  "num_epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs for training */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used for the training (e.g., Adam, Rmsprop) */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken for training (in seconds) */,
  "prediction_time" REAL /* Time taken for prediction (in seconds) */,
  "mean_accuracy" REAL /* Mean accuracy achieved during cross-validation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_start_time" TEXT /* Time when the experiment started */,
  "experiment_end_time" TEXT /* Time when the experiment ended */,
  "research_goal" TEXT /* Description of the research goal for the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_optimizer FOREIGN KEY ("optimizer") REFERENCES optimizers ("optimizer_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., CNN, RNN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model architecture */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model architecture */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_architecture_id FOREIGN KEY ("architecture_id") REFERENCES model_architectures ("architecture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public repository, internal data) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Data Scientist, Researcher) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment it pertains to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who recorded the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimizers" (
  "optimizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimizer */,
  "optimizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimizer (e.g., Adam, Rmsprop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimizer */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the optimizer (e.g., learning rate, beta1, beta2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_architectures" (
  "architecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architecture */,
  "architecture_name" TEXT /* Name of the architecture (e.g., CNN, RNN) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the architecture */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the architecture was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the architecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architecture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment it pertains to */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number of the training process */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy achieved at the end of this epoch */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value achieved at the end of this epoch */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who recorded the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_logs" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment it pertains to */,
  "fold" INTEGER /* Fold number of cross-validation */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy achieved during this fold */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who recorded the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment it pertains to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the hyperparameter entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who recorded the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment they are involved in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user participating in the experiment */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in this experiment (e.g., Lead, Contributor) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Time when the user joined the experiment */,
  "left_at" TEXT /* Time when the user left the experiment (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment it pertains to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* The comment text */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Time when the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
